prerequisites: A Recreation.gov RIDB account. Register at https://ridb.recreation.gov/ to receive an API key by email.
A RIDB API key, supplied through the required `apikey` field. This is the credential the connector sends on every request.
Network access to the RIDB API base URL https://ridb.recreation.gov/api/v1/.
Optionally decide whether to enable the `query_campsites` config field, which controls whether campsite data is queried (it is not required).

authMethods.name: API key (apikey)
authMethods.summary: The Recreation Information Database (RIDB) API authenticates with a single API key, mapped to the connector's required `apikey` secret field. RIDB expects the key in an HTTP request header named `apikey`. There is no OAuth or username/password flow; the key alone authorizes all requests.

setupSteps.title: Obtain a RIDB API key
setupSteps.body: Go to https://ridb.recreation.gov/ and register with your email address to obtain an API key. RIDB sends the API key to your email after registration. Recreation.gov publishes this data for free and does not require you to contact them before using it.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the connector's required `apikey` field. The connector sends it on every request in the `apikey` HTTP header to authenticate against the RIDB API at https://ridb.recreation.gov/api/v1/.

setupSteps.title: Configure the optional campsites query
setupSteps.body: Set the optional `query_campsites` config field to control whether campsite data is queried. It is not required; leave it unset to use the connector's default behavior.

sources.title: Recreation.gov - Use and Share Our Data

Recreation Information Database API (base URL and authentication)
adhocteam/recreation-mcp-server - obtaining a RIDB API key
